flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Albertus Magnus College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.4k → $41.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Albertus Magnus College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.4k → $41.9k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Albertus Magnus College rose 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($27.2k → $31.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Albertus Magnus College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (59.2% → 51.5%).
